name: NHL94 Offensive Curriculum
description: Example curriculum showing how to chain NHL94 live-training phases with shared arguments.

phases.name: Keep Puck
phases.description: Teach possession and movement in the attack zone.

phases.name: Passing
phases.description: Build passing mechanics before shot-finishing drills.

phases.name: One Timers
phases.description: Train fast pass-to-shot timing in offensive scenarios.

phases.name: Cross Crease
phases.description: Train lateral puck movement and crease-side finishing.

phases.name: Defense Zone
phases.description: Recover the puck in the defensive zone and transition it cleanly toward attack.

phases.name: SelfPlay Offense Finetune 1
phases.description: Finetune attacking from the attack zone against a frozen defensive opponent (first alternating block).

phases.name: SelfPlay Defense Finetune 1
phases.description: Finetune defending from the defensive zone against a frozen offensive opponent (first alternating block).

phases.name: SelfPlay Offense Finetune 2
phases.description: Second alternating offense finetune block with an updated opponent pool.

phases.name: SelfPlay Defense Finetune 2
phases.description: Second alternating defense finetune block with an updated opponent pool.

phases.name: Start State Test
phases.description: Evaluate the chained model from the normal game start state without additional training.
